build_system: pnpm with Next.js 16.2.6, Tailwind CSS v4, Shadcn UI components
test_framework: No test framework configured - verification via build only
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx next build' in /projects/sandbox/Khmer-Store 2. Confirm all routes compile without errors 3. Check for TypeScript errors in build output
setup_instructions: pnpm install in /projects/sandbox/Khmer-Store. NODE_OPTIONS must be unset before running next build due to sandbox quirk.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages. No Docker daemon. Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before running next build/dev. No Supabase connection available for runtime testing - validate via TypeScript compilation only.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md present. Standard Next.js conventions apply.
key_patterns: - Dark theme design system with CSS variables (--color-background: #0F1115, --color-surface: #181A20, --color-elevated: #1F222A, --color-accent-gold: #C6A769). - Shadcn UI components in src/components/ui/. - Layout components in src/components/layout/ (header, footer, mobile-nav). - Feature-based organization in src/features/. - Supabase client/server helpers in src/lib/supabase/. - Middleware at src/middleware.ts (note: not inside src/app). - Categories defined in src/constants/categories.ts. - Zustand store for auth in src/stores/auth-store.ts. - framer-motion animations via ScrollReveal component. - font-playfair for headings, Inter for body.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages (auth, marketplace, dashboard, listing, post, messages, about, contact, terms, privacy). src/components/ui/ - Shadcn UI primitives. src/components/layout/ - header, footer, mobile-nav. src/components/shared/ - reusable components. src/features/auth/ - auth forms and actions. src/lib/supabase/ - Supabase client helpers. src/stores/ - Zustand stores. src/types/ - TypeScript types. src/constants/ - categories, roles. src/config/ - site config. supabase/migrations/ - 4 SQL migration files.
